examples: He ensconced himself in the closet in order to eavesdrop.
She ensconced herself in the closet in order to eavesdrop.
Go to a place where there are a lot of people and eavesdrop on a conversation.
It could also allow security forces or businesses to intercept and eavesdrop on messages.
He writes as if he's allowing you to eavesdrop, so cup your ear and enjoy.
